howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Title: Post Your Job & Set a Fixed Price
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe what you need and set the exact amount you will pay. No guessing, no back-and-forth negotiation.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Verified professionals see your job in real-time. The very first one to click Accept gets it — speed wins.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The pro contacts you immediately. No waiting 24 hours for quotes. No comparing 10 proposals.
